name: Doki Doki Literature Club!
descr:
[h2]Hi, Monika here![/h2]
Welcome to the Literature Club! It's always been a dream of mine to make something special out of the things I love. Now that you're a club member, you can help me make that dream come true in this cute game!

Every day is full of chit-chat and fun activities with all of my adorable and unique club members:

[b]Sayori[/b], the youthful bundle of sunshine who values happiness the most;
[b]Natsuki[/b], the deceivingly cute girl who packs an assertive punch;
[b]Yuri[/b], the timid and mysterious one who finds comfort in the world of books;
...And, of course, [b]Monika[/b], the leader of the club! That's me!

I'm super excited for you to make friends with everyone and help the Literature Club become a more intimate place for all my members. But I can tell already that you're a sweetheart—will you promise to spend the most time with me? ♥

[b]This game is not suitable for children
or those who are easily disturbed.[/b]

[url=https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fstore.teamsalvato.com][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/698780/extras/store_banner.png?t=1681943582[/img][/url]

【游戏简介】

[h2]Hi, Monika here![/h2]
Welcome to the Literature Club! It's always been a dream of mine to make something special out of the things I love. Now that you're a club member, you can help me make that dream come true in this cute game!

Every day is full of chit-chat and fun activities with all of my adorable and unique club members:

[b]Sayori[/b], the youthful bundle of sunshine who values happiness the most;
[b]Natsuki[/b], the deceivingly cute girl who packs an assertive punch;
[b]Yuri[/b], the timid and mysterious one who finds comfort in the world of books;
...And, of course, [b]Monika[/b], the leader of the club! That's me!

I'm super excited for you to make friends with everyone and help the Literature Club become a more intimate place for all my members. But I can tell already that you're a sweetheart—will you promise to spend the most time with me? ♥

[b]This game is not suitable for children
or those who are easily disturbed.[/b]
